# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/build/candidate_benchmarks/candidate_batch_preflight/selected_kernel_batch_001
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Build a 32 bit version of the library.
BENCHMARK_BUILD_32_BITS:BOOL=OFF

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during coverage builds.
BENCHMARK_CXX_FLAGS_COVERAGE:STRING=-g -Rno-debug-disables-optimization

//Allow the downloading and in-tree building of unmet dependencies
BENCHMARK_DOWNLOAD_DEPENDENCIES:BOOL=OFF

//Build documentation with Doxygen.
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_DOXYGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the use of exceptions in the benchmark library.
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_EXCEPTIONS:BOOL=ON

//Enable building the unit tests which depend on gtest
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_GTEST_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable installation of benchmark. (Projects embedding benchmark
// may want to turn this OFF.)
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Enable performance counters provided by libpfm
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_LIBPFM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable link time optimisation of the benchmark library.
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_LTO:BOOL=OFF

BENCHMARK_ENABLE_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//Build Release candidates with -Werror.
BENCHMARK_ENABLE_WERROR:BOOL=ON

//Flags used for linking binaries during coverage builds.
BENCHMARK_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_COVERAGE:STRING=

//Build Release candidates with -Werror regardless of compiler
// issues.
BENCHMARK_FORCE_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Enable installation of documentation.
BENCHMARK_INSTALL_DOCS:BOOL=ON

//Flags used by the shared libraries linker during coverage builds.
BENCHMARK_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_COVERAGE:STRING=

//Use bundled GoogleTest. If disabled, the find_package(GTest)
// will be used.
BENCHMARK_USE_BUNDLED_GTEST:BOOL=ON

//Build and test using libc++ as the standard library.
BENCHMARK_USE_LIBCXX:BOOL=OFF

//Builds the googlemock subproject
BUILD_GMOCK:BOOL=ON

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/bin/icpx

//LLVM archiver
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR-NOTFOUND

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g -Rno-debug-disables-optimization

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/bin/icx

//LLVM archiver

//Generate index for LLVM archive
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g -Rno-debug-disables-optimization

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Enable filter-generated BMG regular GEMM exhaustive registrations.
CUTLASS_BENCHMARK_EXHAUSTIVE_GEMM:BOOL=ON

//Enable expanded BMG StreamK/DataParallel/SplitK benchmark registrations.
CUTLASS_BENCHMARK_EXPANDED_BMG_STREAMK:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
CUTLASS_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/build/candidate_benchmarks/candidate_batch_preflight/selected_kernel_batch_001

//Utilize profiler-based functional regressions
CUTLASS_BUILD_FOR_PROFILER_REGRESSIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Determines whether the cutlass library is generated as a single
// file or multiple files.
CUTLASS_BUILD_MONO_LIBRARY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable/Disable rigorous conv problem sizes in conv unit tests
CUTLASS_CONV_UNIT_TEST_RIGOROUS_SIZE_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

//Level of debug tracing to perform.
CUTLASS_DEBUG_TRACE_LEVEL:STRING=0

//Default
//\n  activated test sets. In `make test` mode, this string determines
// the
//\n  active set of tests. In `ctest` mode, this value can be overriden
//\n  with CUTLASS_TEST_SETS environment variable when running the
// ctest
//\n  executable.
CUTLASS_DEFAULT_ACTIVE_TEST_SETS:STRING=default

//CUTLASS Repository Directory
CUTLASS_DIR:PATH=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/sycl-tla

//Enable CUTLASS Benchmarks
CUTLASS_ENABLE_BENCHMARKS:BOOL=ON

//cuBLAS usage for tests
CUTLASS_ENABLE_CUBLAS:BOOL=OFF

//cuDNN usage for tests
CUTLASS_ENABLE_CUDNN:BOOL=OFF

//Enable CUTLASS Examples
CUTLASS_ENABLE_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable F16C x86 extensions in host code.
CUTLASS_ENABLE_F16C:BOOL=OFF

//Enables Grid Dependency Control (GDC) for SM100 kernels (required
// for PDL).
CUTLASS_ENABLE_GDC_FOR_SM100:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUTLASS GTest-based Unit Tests
CUTLASS_ENABLE_GTEST_UNIT_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//Enable only the header library
CUTLASS_ENABLE_HEADERS_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable CUTLASS Library
CUTLASS_ENABLE_LIBRARY:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUTLASS Performance
CUTLASS_ENABLE_PERFORMANCE:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUTLASS Profiler
CUTLASS_ENABLE_PROFILER:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUTLASS Profiler-based Unit Tests
CUTLASS_ENABLE_PROFILER_UNIT_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUTLASS check for self-contained header includes
CUTLASS_ENABLE_SELF_CONTAINED_INCLUDES_CHECK:BOOL=ON

//Enable an extended set of SM90 WGMMA instruction shapes (may
// lead to increased compilation times)
CUTLASS_ENABLE_SM90_EXTENDED_MMA_SHAPES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SYCL
CUTLASS_ENABLE_SYCL:BOOL=ON

//Enable synchronization event logging for race condition debugging.
// WARNING: This redefines __syncthreads() and __syncwarp() in
// all downstream code!
CUTLASS_ENABLE_SYNCLOG:BOOL=OFF

//Enable PTX mma instruction for collective matrix multiply operations.
CUTLASS_ENABLE_TENSOR_CORE_MMA:BOOL=OFF

//Enable CUTLASS Tests
CUTLASS_ENABLE_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//Enable CUTLASS Tools
CUTLASS_ENABLE_TOOLS:BOOL=ON

//CUTLASS Header Library
CUTLASS_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/sycl-tla/include

//Install test executables
CUTLASS_INSTALL_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
CUTLASS_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Default postfix value for debug libraries
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=.debug

//Comma-delimited list of kernels to exclude from build. This option
// always takes effect, whether or not CUTLASS_LIBRARY_KERNELS
// is set. It also can exclude kernels from the filter file (see
// KERNEL_FILTER_FILE).
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_EXCLUDE_KERNELS:STRING=

//Generated kernel listing file
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_GENERATED_KERNEL_LIST_FILE:STRING=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/build/candidate_benchmarks/candidate_batch_preflight/selected_kernel_batch_001/tools/library/generated_kernels.txt

//Intel Xe architectures (12=PVC, 20=BMG)
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_GENERATOR_ARCHS:STRING=20

//GPU to use for GEMM heuristics
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_HEURISTICS_GPU:STRING=

//Restrict heuristics kernels to only the default set of kernels
// emitted by generator.py
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_HEURISTICS_RESTRICT_KERNELS:BOOL=OFF

//Generated heuristics configs CSV
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_HEURISTICS_TESTLIST_FILE:STRING=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/build/candidate_benchmarks/candidate_batch_preflight/selected_kernel_batch_001/tools/library/heuristics.csv

//Comma-delimited list of kernels to exclude from build. This option
// ONLY takes effect if CUTLASS_LIBRARY_KERNELS is set.
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_IGNORE_KERNELS:STRING=

//Instantiation level for SM90 and SM100 kernels. Set to `max`
// and make sure CUTLASS_LIBRARY_KERNELS is non-empty to stamp
// all possible kernel configurations.
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_INSTANTIATION_LEVEL:STRING=0

//Comma-delimited list of kernel name filters. If unspecified,
// only the largest tile size is enabled. If the string 'all' is
// specified, all kernels are enabled.
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_KERNELS:STRING=*

//Comma-delimited list of operation name filters. Default '' means
// all operations are enabled.
CUTLASS_LIBRARY_OPERATIONS:STRING=gemm

//Top level namespace of CUTLASS
CUTLASS_NAMESPACE:STRING=cutlass

//The SM architectures requested.
CUTLASS_NVCC_ARCHS:STRING=

//The SM architectures to build code for.
CUTLASS_NVCC_ARCHS_ENABLED:STRING=

//Embed compiled CUDA kernel binaries into executables.
CUTLASS_NVCC_EMBED_CUBIN:BOOL=ON

//Embed compiled PTX into executables.
CUTLASS_NVCC_EMBED_PTX:BOOL=ON

//Keep intermediate files generated by NVCC.
CUTLASS_NVCC_KEEP:BOOL=OFF

//Disable compilation of reference kernels in the CUTLASS profiler.
CUTLASS_PROFILER_DISABLE_REFERENCE:BOOL=OFF

//Profiler functional regression test level
CUTLASS_PROFILER_REGRESSION_TEST_LEVEL:STRING=0

//Disable init reduction workspace
CUTLASS_SKIP_REDUCTION_INIT:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
CUTLASS_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/sycl-tla

//Enable this option to use builtin functions instead of SPIR-V
// for Block Copy & MMA operations
CUTLASS_SYCL_BUILTIN_ENABLE:BOOL=OFF

//Stop oneMKL from updating when the git tag is not changed
CUTLASS_SYCL_DISCONNECT_ONEMKL_UPDATE:BOOL=ON

//Use SYCL events to calculate device execution time
CUTLASS_SYCL_PROFILING_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Enable this option when building in a CI environment.
//\n                                It activates CI specific configurations,
// such as additional checks or selectively
//\n                                disabling tests that cannot
// run in CI.
CUTLASS_SYCL_RUNNING_CI:BOOL=OFF

//Enable oneMKL-dependent SYCL utilities and targets
CUTLASS_SYCL_USE_ONEMKL:BOOL=ON

//Enable caching and reuse of test results in unit tests
CUTLASS_TEST_ENABLE_CACHED_RESULTS:BOOL=ON

//Environment in which to invoke unit test executables
CUTLASS_TEST_EXECUTION_ENVIRONMENT:BOOL=

//Test root install location, relative to CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX.
CUTLASS_TEST_INSTALL_BINDIR:STRING=test/cutlass/bin

//Test root install location, relative to CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX.
CUTLASS_TEST_INSTALL_LIBDIR:STRING=test/cutlass/lib

//Test root install location, relative to CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX.
CUTLASS_TEST_INSTALL_PREFIX:STRING=test/cutlass

//Level of tests to compile.
CUTLASS_TEST_LEVEL:STRING=0

//Enable warnings on waived unit tests.
CUTLASS_TEST_UNIT_ENABLE_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Use system/external installation of GTest
CUTLASS_USE_SYSTEM_GOOGLETEST:BOOL=OFF

//OFF
CXXFEATURECHECK_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Maximum time allowed before CTest will kill the test.
DART_TESTING_TIMEOUT:STRING=1500

DOXYGEN_DOT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/dot

//Doxygen documentation generation tool (https://www.doxygen.nl)
DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

// (ITT) device libraries for VTune
DPCPP_DISABLE_ITT_FOR_CUTLASS:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
DPCPP_HOST_COMPILER:UNINITIALIZED=g++-13

//Path to a library.
DPCPP_LIB_DIR:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/lib/libsycl.so

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
DPCPP_SYCL_TARGET:UNINITIALIZED=intel_gpu_bmg_g31

//Additional user-specified compiler flags for DPC++
DPCPP_USER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Enables cluster BLAS library
ENABLE_BLACS:BOOL=OFF

//Enables BLAS Fortran95 API
ENABLE_BLAS95:BOOL=OFF

//Enables cluster DFT library
ENABLE_CDFT:BOOL=OFF

//Enables LAPACK Fortran95 API
ENABLE_LAPACK95:BOOL=OFF

//Enables OpenMP Offload functionality
ENABLE_OMP_OFFLOAD:BOOL=OFF

//Enables cluster LAPACK library
ENABLE_SCALAPACK:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SYCL compiler support
ENABLE_SYCL_COMPILER:STRING=AUTO

//Enables compiling a oneMKL SYCL test program
ENABLE_TRY_SYCL_COMPILE:BOOL=OFF

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/build/candidate_benchmarks/candidate_batch_preflight/selected_kernel_batch_001/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for googlebenchmark
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_GOOGLEBENCHMARK:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for googletest
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_GOOGLETEST:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of googlebenchmark
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_GOOGLEBENCHMARK:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of googletest
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_GOOGLETEST:BOOL=OFF

//GoogleBench repo to fetch
GBENCH_REPOSITORY:STRING=https://github.com/google/benchmark.git

//Path to a program.
GITCOMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//Location of local GoogleBenchmark repo to build against
GOOGLEBENCHMARK_DIR:STRING=

//Location of local GoogleTest repo to build against
GOOGLETEST_DIR:STRING=

//Use Abseil and RE2. Requires Abseil and RE2 to be separately
// added to the build.
GTEST_HAS_ABSL:BOOL=OFF

//GoogleTest repo to fetch
GTEST_REPOSITORY:STRING=https://github.com/google/googletest.git

//Do not explicitly specify -std=c++17 if set
IMPLICIT_CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable installation of googletest. (Projects embedding googletest
// may want to turn this OFF.)
INSTALL_GTEST:BOOL=ON

KERNEL_FILTER_FILE:STRING=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/reports/selected_kernel_filter_part001.list

//Path to a program.
LLVM_FILECHECK_EXE:FILEPATH=LLVM_FILECHECK_EXE-NOTFOUND

//Command to build the project
MAKECOMMAND:STRING=/usr/bin/cmake --build . --config "${CTEST_CONFIGURATION_TYPE}"

//Path to the memory checking command, used for memory error detection.
MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND:FILEPATH=MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND-NOTFOUND

//File that contains suppressions for the memory checker
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE:FILEPATH=

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for MKL.
MKL_DIR:PATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/lib/cmake/mkl

//Path to a file.
MKL_INCLUDE:PATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/include

//Choose MKL_INTERFACE_FULL options are: intel_ilp64;intel_lp64
MKL_INTERFACE_FULL:STRING=intel_ilp64

//Choose MKL_LINK options are: static;dynamic;sdl
MKL_LINK:STRING=dynamic

//Choose MKL_MPI options are: intelmpi;openmpi;mpich;mpich2
MKL_MPI:STRING=intelmpi

//Choose MKL_SYCL_INTERFACE_FULL options are: intel_lp64;intel_ilp64
MKL_SYCL_INTERFACE_FULL:STRING=intel_ilp64

//Choose MKL_SYCL_LINK options are: static;dynamic
MKL_SYCL_LINK:STRING=dynamic

//Choose MKL_SYCL_MPI options are: intelmpi
MKL_SYCL_MPI:STRING=intelmpi

//Choose MKL_SYCL_THREADING options are: sequential;intel_thread;tbb_thread
MKL_SYCL_THREADING:STRING=tbb_thread

//Choose MKL_THREADING options are: sequential;intel_thread;tbb_thread
MKL_THREADING:STRING=intel_thread

//Path to a file.
MKL_VERSION_H:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2025.3/include/mkl_version.h

//Path to a library.
OMP_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/lib/libiomp5.so

//Name of the filtered kernel list
SELECTED_KERNEL_LIST:STRING=selected

//Name of the computer/site where compile is being run
SITE:STRING=b70-maginfra-2

//Path to a library.
SYCL_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2025.3/lib/libsycl.so

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for TBB.
TBB_DIR:PATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/tbb/2022.3/lib/cmake/tbb

//Path to a library.
_tbb_release_lib:FILEPATH=/opt/intel/oneapi/tbb/2022.3/lib/intel64/gcc4.8/libtbb.so.12

//Value Computed by CMake
benchmark_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/root/cutlass_profile_device7_b70_2500mhz/ali_one_8192_4096_1536_layered_bmg_final_flagsfixed_20260522_0425_ws/build/candidate_benchmarks/candidate_batch_preflight/selected_kernel_batch_001/_deps/googlebenchmark-build

//Value Computed by CMake

//Build gtest's sample programs.
gtest_build_samples:BOOL=OFF

//Build all of gtest's own tests.
gtest_build_tests:BOOL=OFF

//Disable uses of pthreads in gtest.
gtest_disable_pthreads:BOOL=OFF

//Use shared (DLL) run-time lib even when Google Test is built
// as static lib.
gtest_force_shared_crt:BOOL=OFF

//Build gtest with internal symbols hidden in shared libraries.
gtest_hide_internal_symbols:BOOL=OFF
